payload.answer: The new claim directly contradicts the existing memory: Sam from Goldman cannot both have two children and have no children. Do not overwrite the existing memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same described person: Sam from Goldman.

details: Detected a direct contradiction between existing and new child-count claims.

repair_options: Ask for clarification about whether the new statement corrects the old memory.

If not confirmed, retain the existing memory that Sam from Goldman has two children.
